summary: Report the tight bounding box and occupancy (count of positive-coverage pixels) of a coverage Mask's nonzero region; an empty mask reports empty bounds and zero occupancy.

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: The coverage mask whose nonzero bounds and occupancy are reported.

outputs.name: report
outputs.doc: The bounds report: the tight nonzero bounding box (changed_bounds) and occupancy (changed_count).
